---
title: "search.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\live\search.ts"
loc: 74
complexity: 9
logic_score: 3.65
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 5.78
overall_score: 4.22
---

## Intent
The `search.ts` module implements the high-fidelity search interface for the Gungnir Matrix. It combines SQLite FTS5 results with real-time graph filtering to help agents and architects locate specific logic, intents, or files within the neural map.

## Interaction Protocol
Invoke the `searchMatrix` function with a natural language query. It outputs a formatted report to the console, identifying matching sectors and their associated Gungnir metrics.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 26 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.ts)
- [searchIntents](file://../intel/database.ts)
- [HUD](file://../../../node/core/hud.ts)

### Exports
- `searchMatrix`
- `searchMatrix`
- `palette`
- `dbResults`
- `statsDir`
- `graphPath`
- `graph`
- `entry`
- `m`
- `statsDir`
- `graphPath`
- `raw`
- `graph`
- `results`
- `lowerQuery`
- `relPath`
- `intentText`
- `matchesIntent`
- `matchesPath`
- `m`
- `q`
